title: CreamyCraft Client
description: Elevate your vanilla Minecraft experience with refined visuals and seamless quality-of-life improvements, now smoother than ever with render distance spanning thousands of blocks!
body:
# About the CreamyCraft Modpack
The CreamyCraft Client modpack, curated by MeltedButter, is designed for the discerning Minecraft player who values an authentic experience. This modpack specifically caters to those who wish to maintain the integrity of the base game, while seeking visual and quality-of-life enhancements without the bloat.

# Features:
- High render distance. You will be able to see 100s of blocks away with minimal preformance impact, even on any server.
- Player heads appear next to their messages and what they say appears above their head!
- Shaders are supported and make the game stunning
- Quality of life features improve item management
- Better visuals like more animations and dynamic light sources
- Dynamic Fulbright - allows for seeing in the dark without making caves look odd
- Added visual effects like water splashes and other small additions

Yes this modpack can be run on vanilla servers. Make sure to follow the rules of the server and have fun!

<details>

- Dungeons and Taverns Stronghold Rework
- Dungeons and Taverns Swamp Hut Rework

Note: Included generation mods only work for Singleplayer. Servers may run these as a datapack allowing for vanilla connections.

Please remember to ask server admins before using this pack as some features may be considered cheating.
